title: Papyrus #0267: Greek-Egyptian Medical Papyrus
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — medical papyrus document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — medical papyrus document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a medical papyrus document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
